items.statcast_observation: Bobby Witt Jr. produced the hardest tracked Royals contact: 112.2 mph at a -7.0 degree launch angle.
items.summary: The Royals lost to the New York Yankees, KC 3, NYY 4. Michael Wacha led the night, working 7.0 innings with 2 earned runs, 5 strikeouts and 2 walks. Bobby Witt Jr. supplied the loudest Royals contact at 112.2 mph.
items.title: Royals vs Yankees Recap
